title: auto - letting the type be inferred
author: Prodipta Acharjee
concept: C++ is statically typed, but auto lets the compiler infer the type from the value.
explanation: When the type is obvious from the right-hand side, auto saves you writing it out. The variable is still strongly typed - auto just works out what that type is.

quiz.question: What type does 'auto count = 10;' give count?
